roles.name: easyfire-production-action-approved-monolith
roles.reason: Exact path-scoped takeover exception at 2,764 lines (critical under defaults): splitting the journal-bound production state machine during recovery would create disproportionate release risk. Containment is the current 101-of-101 static validator, focused crash/authority tests, and a required disposable full-stack, backup, restore, cleanup, and production-invariance proof before release. Re-review when this file reaches 3,000 lines or its journal/state-transition contract changes.

roles.name: generated-artifact
roles.reason: Generated artifacts and local logs are governed by artifact retention, not source splitting.

roles.name: documentation
roles.reason: Long docs should split, summarize, or archive before they become hard to review.

roles.name: structured-config
roles.reason: Large config/data files should split by domain or move generated data out of Git.

roles.name: static-markup
roles.reason: Static markup should split templates, data, and generated output before becoming monolithic.
